mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM suggestion WHERE sugg_usage = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, S.* FROM ( SELECT sugg_no, sugg_title, sugg_content, sugg_writer, sugg_pw, sugg_answer, sugg_cdate, sugg_mdate, sugg_usage FROM suggestion WHERE sugg_usage = 'Y' ORDER BY sugg_no DESC ) S ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{page.startRow} AND #{page.endRow}
SELECT sugg_no, sugg_title, sugg_content, sugg_writer, sugg_pw, sugg_answer, sugg_cdate, sugg_mdate, sugg_usage FROM suggestion WHERE sugg_no = #{sugg_no} AND sugg_usage = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO suggestion ( sugg_no, sugg_title, sugg_content, sugg_writer, sugg_pw, sugg_answer, sugg_cdate, sugg_usage ) VALUES ( seq_suggestion.NEXTVAL, #{sugg_title}, #{sugg_content}, #{sugg_writer}, #{sugg_pw}, '대기', SYSDATE, 'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE suggestion SET sugg_title = #{sugg_title}, sugg_content = #{sugg_content}, sugg_mdate = SYSDATE WHERE sugg_no = #{sugg_no} AND sugg_usage = 'Y'
UPDATE suggestion SET sugg_usage = 'N' WHERE sugg_no = #{sugg_no} AND sugg_usage = 'Y'
